<h3><a name="p-11954-topics-4" class="anchor" href="#p-11954-topics-4" aria-label="Heading link"></a>Topics:</h3>
<ul>
<li>
<p>[Guan-Ming Chiu] Golang port of Evaluation Engine project update</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>[Lee Calcote] Meshery Schemas v1.0 (PR <a href="https://github.com/meshery/schemas/pull/678" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">#678</a>), MeshKit v1.0</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Here is the definitive <a href="https://mesheryio.slack.com/archives/CFGG6U10E/p1775004924097609" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">list of new schemas and their latest versions</a>.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>You can run make schemas-versions or make schemas-versions-latest to get this list from the meshery/schemas repo.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Meshery Server and UI upgrade today (PR <a href="https://github.com/meshery/meshery/pull/18373" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">#18373</a>)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Meshery Cloud upgrade today (PR <a href="https://github.com/layer5io/meshery-cloud/pull/4932" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">#4932</a>)</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>[Raunak Madan] API Documentation for Meshery &amp; Layer5 docs</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Use open API for Meshery Docs REST APIs <a href="https://github.com/meshery/meshery/pull/18304" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">#18304</a>, <a href="https://69cca0a79541dac66b460a1d--meshery-docs-preview.netlify.app/reference/rest-apis/" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">Preview</a></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Publish Cloud REST APIs in Layer5 docs <a href="https://github.com/layer5io/docs/pull/930" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">#930</a>, <a href="https://deploy-preview-930--bejewelled-pegasus-b0ce81.netlify.app/cloud/reference/api-reference/" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">Preview</a></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>[Pragalva Sapkota] Enhancing and cleaning up of existing workflows PR <a href="https://github.com/layer5labs/meshery-extensions-packages/pull/675" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">#675</a>, <a href="https://github.com/meshery/schemas/pull/684" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">#684</a></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>[Raunak Madan] Cleanup in meshery-cloud after displacing <a href="https://cloud.meshery.io/system/api/docs">cloud.meshery.io/system/api/docs</a> and publishing apis to<a href="http://docs.layer5.io/cloud/reference/api-reference/"> </a><a href="http://docs.layer5.io/cloud/">docs.layer5.io/cloud/</a> <a href="https://github.com/layer5io/meshery-cloud/pull/4944" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">#4944</a></p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>[Pragalva Sapkota] Meshery server API endpoint audit script (<a href="https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1YYpMp0H1vlcdnWReaNfVzPcBHXAIlNh52tYBBaRBP7s/edit?usp=sharing" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">Spreadsheet</a>, PR <a href="https://github.com/meshery/meshery/pull/18376" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">#18376</a>)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>[Yash Mahakal] <a href="https://github.com/layer5io/mui-datatables/pull/26" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">Migration of mui-datatables to SWC</a></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>[Jay Shaw] Remove dependency from aws, az, binary (as a part of improving underlying dependencies of mesheryctl connection:  (related to? <a href="https://github.com/meshery/meshery/issues/3995" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">issues/3995</a>, <a href="https://github.com/meshery/meshery/issues/2971" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">issues/2971</a>, <a href="https://github.com/meshery/meshery/issues/4184" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">issues/4184</a>)</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><a href="https://github.com/meshery/meshery/blob/master/mesheryctl/internal/cli/root/system/config.go#L250" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">mesheryctl/internal/cli/root/system/config.go#L250</a></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><a href="https://github.com/meshery/meshery/blob/master/mesheryctl/internal/cli/root/system/config.go#L180" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">mesheryctl/internal/cli/root/system/config.go#L180</a></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><a href="https://mesheryio.slack.com/archives/C0130BQ4L3T/p1775050286563259" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">Slack thread</a> – Please add your suggestions. There were a tonn of good suggestions from <span class="mention">@Hussaina</span> Begum, <span class="mention">@Sangram</span> Rath</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>

</li>
